ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Original certificate with ICC stamp and verification code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Invoice Original No. 921007402.

document_pairing.method: Consignor matches invoice issuer; consignee matches customer; shipping marks match; LC number matches; goods description matches.

criteria_met: Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' matches invoice issuer 'ARA Timber AB'
Consignee 'LIBYA ALWATANIYA ALAWLA FOR WOOD INDUSTRIES AND FURNITURE' matches invoice customer
Shipping marks 5808, 5836, 5850, 5913 match in both documents

lc_validation.explanation: The certificate contains the text 'L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25' in box 6. 'L/C NUMBER' is a separate field label/phrase (a bank-term designation meaning 'Letter of Credit Number') followed by the LC number 'MEDIT/02/LC48/25'. This is not a substring of another reference number — it is an explicit LC field label. The same L/C reference appears in the invoice: 'L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25'. The invoice also confirms 'Terms of payment: Letter of Credit'. LC exception is activated per section 2.2.

candidates.raw_text: LIBYA ALWATANIYA ALAWLA FOR WOOD INDUSTRIES AND FURNITURE

candidates.raw_text:
REDWOOD HS CODE: 44071190
217 packages / 494 659 kgs

WE HEREBY STATE THAT THE GOODS BEING EXPORTED ARE NATIONAL ORIGIN OF SWEDEN AND NORWAY
LIBYA ALWATANIYA ALAWLA FOR WOOD INDUSTRIES AND FURNITURE

comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains explicit 'Country of origin' field with value 'Sweden and Norway'.
Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden and Norway'. Extracted: Sweden, Norway.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice Country of origin field: 'Sweden and Norway' — contains 'Sweden'. Exact textual match.
Certificate: 'Norway'. Invoice Country of origin field: 'Sweden and Norway' — contains 'Norway'. Exact textual match.

comparison_steps.description: Verify explicit origin field requirement for LC exception
comparison_steps.details: Invoice field is explicitly labeled 'Country of origin' — this is a dedicated origin field as required by section 2.2 critical rule. Both 'Sweden' and 'Norway' are identified in this explicit origin field.

rules_applied.rule_description: LC exception — only country of origin verified. Each origin in certificate must be found in an explicit origin field in the invoice.
Identification of origin in invoice via 'Country of origin' field.
Normalization of country names — no normalization needed, exact text match.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden and Norway'. Invoice has an explicit 'Country of origin' field stating 'Sweden and Norway'. Both origins — Sweden and Norway — are explicitly identified in the invoice's dedicated origin field. Exact textual match, no normalization required. MATCH.
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate origin: 'Sweden and Norway' (box 3). Invoice origin: 'Sweden and Norway' (explicit 'Country of origin' field). Both countries in the certificate are found verbatim in the invoice's dedicated origin field. Per LC exception (section 2.2), origin must be found in an explicit origin field — this requirement is satisfied. No normalization was needed. Result: MATCH with confidence 0.99.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: LC exception — Letter of Credit check
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: LC exception activated. Certificate contains 'L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25' as a separate field label followed by a specific LC number. Invoice confirms 'Terms of payment: Letter of Credit' and contains matching 'L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25'. Only country of origin is verified; all other checkpoints set to NOT_APPLICABLE.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Exact string in certificate: 'L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25'. 'L/C NUMBER' is a recognized bank-term designation (section 2.2 critical rule). It is a separate label/phrase in the goods description field, not a substring of a reference number. The LC number 'MEDIT/02/LC48/25' follows directly. Validation confirmed: this is a genuine Letter of Credit reference.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Document A identified as certificate file, Document B identified as invoice file. Single certificate and single invoice identified. Pairing is unambiguous.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate file contains one original Certificate of Origin. Invoice file contains one original invoice No. 921007402 from ARA Timber AB.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: PASSED. Criteria met: (1) Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' matches invoice issuer; (2) Consignee matches invoice customer; (3) Shipping marks match.
rule_evaluation_log.details: All three sanity check criteria are met. Pairing is valid.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Identification of country of origin in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Invoice contains explicit 'Country of origin' field with value 'Sweden and Norway'.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Dedicated field identified on invoice page 1.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not needed — exact textual match between certificate and invoice.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Both documents state 'Sweden and Norway' in identical form.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: LC exception should not be activated because 'L/C' might be part of a reference number
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The text 'L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25' in the certificate clearly uses 'L/C NUMBER' as a separate field label — a recognized bank-term designation. It is not embedded within another reference number. The invoice independently confirms 'Terms of payment: Letter of Credit' and contains the matching LC number. All validation criteria per section 2.2 critical rule are met.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller en Letter of Credit-referens (MEDIT/02/LC48/25), vilket innebär att enbart ursprungsland behöver verifieras. Certifikatets ursprungsländer 'Sweden and Norway' överensstämmer exakt med fakturans angivna ursprungsland 'Sweden and Norway'. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: LC exception activated. Only country of origin verified. Certificate states 'Sweden and Norway', invoice explicitly confirms 'Sweden and Norway' in a dedicated Country of origin field. All applicable checkpoints MATCH. Result: IDENTICAL.
non_blocking_observations: LC exception was activated based on 'L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25' in the certificate. Checkpoints 4.1 (Consignor), 4.2 (Consignee), 4.3 (Goods Description), and 4.4 (Quantity) were set to NOT_APPLICABLE per section 2.2.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: L/C NUMBER MEDIT/02/LC48/25 / Terms of payment: Letter of Credit
sections.rule_applied: Avsnitt 2.2 — LC-undantag. Vid Letter of Credit verifieras enbart ursprungsland.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet innehåller en explicit L/C-referens med banktermsbenämningen 'L/C NUMBER' följt av numret 'MEDIT/02/LC48/25'. Fakturan bekräftar 'Terms of payment: Letter of Credit' och anger samma LC-nummer. LC-undantaget aktiveras — enbart ursprungsland verifieras.

sections.rule_applied: Avsnitt 2.2 (LC-undantag) + 4.5.1 — Ursprungsland verifieras mot explicit 'Country of origin'-fält i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'Sweden and Norway' i ruta 3. Fakturan har ett explicit fält 'Country of origin' med värdet 'Sweden and Norway'. Båda ursprungsländerna — Sverige och Norge — kan identifieras ordagrant i fakturans dedikerade ursprungsfält. Exakt textmatchning utan normalisering. MATCH.
